headline.text: L3 had *3 equipment stops* this morning — two cleared quickly, TG#4 still down as of 07:08; L2 hapman faulting intermittently.

per_plant_summary.L1: No activity in the last 24 hours.
per_plant_summary.L2: ML2 line running but hapman continues to fault on auto, causing micro stops — maintenance troubleshooting connections since 06:07. WiFi down plant-wide as of 07:15, IT notified.
per_plant_summary.L3: ML1 had C1 belt misalignment that stopped the line at 07:08 but cleared within 7 minutes. ML4 had TG#3 and TG#4 down at 06:48 — TG#3 back at 07:08 after correcting upside-down part, TG#4 still down with maintenance on site. Dorner 1 belt remains damaged with no spare available.

resolved.title: TG#3 part assembled upside down
resolved.summary: ML4 TG#3 went down at 06:48; maintenance found a part installed incorrectly and corrected the assembly.
resolved.resolution: Corrected and running at 07:08 — "TG#3 is now running, maintenance is still working on #4" (Itzel Chavez).

resolved.title: C1 belt misalignment stopping line
resolved.summary: Belt tracking issues caused constant stops on ML1; maintenance realigned and line resumed production within 7 minutes.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 07:15 — "The line is running again. Maintenance is continuing to make adjustments to the belt" (Grey Boscan).

resolved.title: Back off plow blades scraping on one side only
resolved.summary: ML4 paused at 06:21 to correct plow blade alignment that was only scraping on one side.

needs_attention.title: Hapman faulting on auto, causing micro stops
needs_attention.summary: ML2 hapman continues to fault when running on auto; line is still producing but experiencing repeated micro stops while maintenance troubleshoots connections.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance troubleshooting connections since 06:07, line running with micro stops as of 07:08.

needs_attention.title: WiFi down plant-wide
needs_attention.summary: Plant-wide WiFi outage reported at 07:15; IT has been notified by email.
needs_attention.status: Down as of 07:15, IT notified via email.

needs_attention.title: Dorner 1 belt damaged, no spare available
needs_attention.summary: ML1 Dorner 1 belt has existing damage that was not replaced over the weekend; Preston confirmed no spare belt in stock.
needs_attention.status: Damage confirmed at 06:18, no spare dorner belt available as of 06:44.

needs_attention.title: TG#4 down
needs_attention.summary: ML4 TG#4 went down at 06:48 alongside TG#3; TG#3 was cleared but TG#4 remains offline with maintenance actively troubleshooting.
needs_attention.status: Down since 06:48, maintenance on-site — still working on it as of 07:08.
